501921: SandblastRank 5255% of base mana2 sec castFire a blast of enchanted sand at an enemy, dealing 66+0+ArcP*0.43+RAP*0.4 Arcane Damage and granting you Sands of Time.\n Sands of Time \n Reduces the cast time of Epoch by 20% for 10 sec, stacking 5 times.
